purpose: Define safe rules for future Hindi article-body expansion without uncontrolled translation.

display_rule.english_body: Always available from generated article file.
display_rule.hindi_body: Display only when sidecar item for article path exists and review_status is approved.
display_rule.fallback: If approved Hindi body does not exist, show English body with Hindi metadata where available.

guardrails: Do not translate article body through DOM replacement.
Do not mutate generated article files.
Hindi article body must be reviewed and approved before display.
Sanskrit, mantra, shloka, and named entities must be reviewed manually.
